item.title: Long Beach congressman may get huge power to antagonize Trump if Democrats take midterms
item.description:
If Democrats take control of the House, Rep. Robert Garcia would be in line to lead its powerful Oversight Committee, which can pressure the Trump administration with investigative powers. Experts say that while victory is not guaranteed, a feasible path in the midterms is coming into focus, starting with today’s primaries. 

The post Long Beach congressman may get huge power to antagonize Trump if Democrats take midterms appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/09/29154912/9-29-25-garcia-3-306179-35wsgv63-259041-X1jnlDHO-1024x594.jpg)
If Democrats take control of the House, Rep. Robert Garcia would be in line to lead its powerful Oversight Committee, which can pressure the Trump administration with investigative powers. Experts say that while victory is not guaranteed, a feasible path in the midterms is coming into focus, starting with today’s primaries.
The post [Long Beach congressman may get huge power to antagonize Trump if Democrats take midterms](https://lbpost.com/news/politics/elections/robert-garcia-antagonize-trump-midterms-democrats) appeared first on [Long Beach Post News](https://lbpost.com/news).

item.title: Stretch of old Red Car tracks that became parkland to get long-awaited facelift
item.description:
Once a dumping ground overgrown with tall grass, neighbors hope new trees, native plants and walking paths will turn it into a community gathering space.

The post Stretch of old Red Car tracks that became parkland to get long-awaited facelift appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/19160552/627-54-rjm-design-group-lb-10th-st-greenbelt-144-photo-955201-inrmciai-850947-sLN1CHc4-1024x576.jpg)
Once a dumping ground overgrown with tall grass, neighbors hope new trees, native plants and walking paths will turn it into a community gathering space.

item.title: $6 gas and refinery fears collide with California’s climate ambitions
item.description:
